commit.message:
feat: uCaspian example, Vivado backend enhancements, and build output polish (#6)

## Summary

- **uCaspian example**: Add a real-world neuromorphic processor design
as a multi-target example (Artix-7 + iCE40), demonstrating Loom's
workspace, component, and project manifest system with ~3,500 lines of
SystemVerilog RTL
- **Vivado backend enhancements**: Wall-clock timing per phase,
auto-generated Vivado report files (.rpt), per-clock timing table from
Clock Summary + Intra Clock Table, DCP checkpoint saves at configurable
stages
- **Build output polish**: Optional memory display with auto-scaling
(MB/GB), activity spinners for long writes, column alignment fixes,
pre-synthesis progress tracking, artifact summary (report/checkpoint
counts), clock table header tree connector fix
- **Generated clock detection**: Inject `report_clocks` into Tcl to
identify MMCM/PLL clocks via Attributes column; dim generated clocks in
terminal output; user-configurable filtering via `[build.timing]` in
project.toml
- **Windows path prefix fix**: Add `clean_path()` / `display_path()`
utilities to strip `\?\` prefix from `canonicalize()` output at the
source, ensuring clean paths throughout all downstream code

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: playlist track fidelity — preserve unavailable tracks as placeholders (#39)

* fix: playlist track fidelity — preserve unavailable tracks as placeholders

Spotify playlists with removed/region-restricted tracks returned fewer
items than `tracks_total` because null-track API items and non-track
embed items were silently dropped.

Changes:
- EmbedTrackItem.track_id is now Optional; added `unavailable` bool field
- embed._parse_embed_html: emit placeholder for items without a
  spotify:track: URI instead of skipping them
- playlist_tools.get_playlist: API path emits placeholder dict when
  item.track is None; embed path does the same for null track_id items
- get_playlist response now includes tracks_returned, tracks_unavailable,
  and tracks_mismatch_warning when counts differ from tracks_total
- playlist_ledger_tools.backfill_playlist: reports unavailable_count and
  tracks_total in result; null-ID items excluded from snapshot storage
- cache.put_playlist: coerce None track_name to "" to satisfy NOT NULL

Tests: 5 new tests cover unavailable placeholders, mismatch warning,
embed unavailable fallback, and embed placeholder parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: cache-hit path now includes fidelity metrics; restore unavailable flag on cache read

Address CodeRabbit review:
- Extract _with_fidelity_metrics() static helper; apply to cache-hit early
  return so tracks_returned/tracks_unavailable/tracks_mismatch_warning are
  always present regardless of cache state
- cache._playlist_row_to_full_dict: re-tag tracks with id=None as
  unavailable=True on read, restoring the flag lost at write time
- Add test_get_playlist_cache_hit_fidelity_fields: verifies fidelity fields
  survive a cache hit and that get_playlist_all_tracks is only called once
- Docs: "that get dropped" → "that are dropped"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: coerce tracks_total to int in _with_fidelity_metrics

Cached metadata can have tracks_total=None; result.get("tracks_total", 0)
only falls back to 0 when the key is absent, not when it is None. Using
`or 0` guards against both cases so mismatch warning messages never
show "Spotify reports None tracks...".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
skill-forge: add negative triggers to CSO patterns

Learned from Anthropic's official skills guide — "Do NOT use for..."
in the description steers Claude away at trigger-decision time, before
the body loads. Anti-patterns in the body come too late.

Added: CSO pattern example, when-to-add guidance, bad-pattern table
row, and discovery checklist item.

commit.message:
Add security hardening, input validation, and code splitting (#5)

- Dangerous command blocklist for run_command (rm -rf, sudo, dd, etc.)
- SSRF protection in web_fetch (blocks localhost, private IPs, file://)
- Config file permission enforcement (0o600 check + auto-fix)
- Tool argument schema validation before execution
- Agent loop iteration limit warning when max reached
- Stdout cap (1MB buffer, 100k char truncation) on run_command
- Split tools.ts into tool-defs, tool-utils, tool-exec modules
- 41 tests covering all new security/validation logic

Co-authored-by: coffeepy <goddard.br@gmail.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Safari recording delay: start MediaRecorder before countdown

Safari's MediaRecorder has ~1-1.5s internal startup delay that causes
lost audio at the beginning. Solution:

- Safari: start recording BEFORE countdown (captures silence during 3-2-1),
  then trim leading silence from the blob using Web Audio API
- Other browsers: start recording AFTER countdown (no delay issue)

Added trimLeadingSilence() and audioBufferToWav() helpers for silence
removal. Browser detection via isSafari flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

nav: all RadiatePro brand links point to login.html

Removes all references to index.html as a navigation destination.
Every RadiatePro logo/brand click across login, reset-password,
verify-email, admin, events, and dashboard now routes to login.html.

commit.message:
feat: 添加持久化层、LogicTree 和记忆聚合优化

核心功能：
- 持久化层：SQLite/PostgreSQL 双支持，解决 session 重启丢失问题
- LogicTree：显式三段论推理树（Major Premise → Minor Premise → Conclusion）
- 记忆聚合优化：方差降低算法（3次采样+投票）

新增文件：
- src/persistence/database.py - 数据库连接管理
- src/persistence/session_store.py - Session CRUD 操作
- src/agents/logic_tree.py - 三段论推理树
- src/memory/aggregation_operators.py - 显式聚合算子
- scripts/init_database.py - 数据库初始化脚本
- OPTIMIZATION_SUMMARY.md - 优化总结文档
- QUICK_START_OPTIMIZATION.md - 快速开始指南

修改文件：
- requirements.txt - 添加 sqlalchemy, psycopg2-binary
- src/config.py - 添加数据库和聚合配置

技术亮点：
- 方差降低：多次采样+投票，降低记忆压缩不确定性
- 有限轮次收敛：最多3轮迭代，时间复杂度可接受
- 可追溯性：LogicTree 提供明确的推理路径
- 跨 session 分析：支持用户研究数据收集

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: trim install section to two commands + one sentence (#19)

Removed CLI command examples, platform adapter table, and detailed
guides link from the install section. Buyers just need the two install
commands. Everything else is in `npx help` and docs/.

commit.message:
feat: update LAUNCHES_TIMELINE with real data for Mar 4-5

Added 20 launch events for March 4 (was 11) and 16 for March 5
(was 0) based on Tzeva Adom API siren data + verified sources.

March 4: Added 9 Hezbollah evening attacks from API (13:25-23:57)
and corrected Iran wave times to match actual siren data.

March 5: Added all 16 major launch waves (7 Iran + 9 Lebanon)
with city counts from API. Missile counts set to 0 where
per-wave data unavailable (aggregate: CENTCOM 500+ missiles).

Updated THREAT_SOURCES stats:
- Iran: 138 cumulative waves (Alma), 10-11 killed, 1,473+ wounded
- Lebanon: 62+ attacks cumulative, 30+/day on Mar 5

Sources: Tzeva Adom API, Alma Center, CENTCOM, FDD, JPost, ToI

fix: remove 10 non-boss entries from boss_names.json (v1.9.2)

Remove regular enemies incorrectly listed as bosses, causing false
positive OCR detections (e.g. "Troll de Pierre" triggered when
picking up forge stones):

- Troll de Pierre, Troll Chevalier, Troll des Ruines
- Aigle Tempête, Dragon de Pierre d'Éclat
- Félin Léonin Géant, Loup Léonin Géant
- Fleur de Miranda, Revenant Royal, Ombre Funeste

204 boss names remain (verified against bosses.json source of truth).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix black screen: eliminate duplicate Supabase client + add getSession timeout

- AntiGravityBoot was creating a SECOND Supabase client via createClient(),
  causing navigator.locks contention with the shared client from lib/supabase.ts
- This made getSession() hang indefinitely → boot() never completes → black screen
- Now uses the shared Supabase client (single instance)
- Added 8s timeout to getSession() in both AntiGravityBoot and IdentityDNA
- On timeout, still marks supabaseOk=true so app renders (auth resolves later)

- mostrarPedido: fuerza estado 'sin-iniciar' en temporizador al cargar pedido nuevo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Back up DMG on notarization submit and run full CI on main pushes

Add backup_dmg() to notarize submit — copies the DMG to
_build/release/<name>-YYYYMMDDThhmm.dmg after successful submission,
preserving the exact artifact sent to Apple.

Update CI so pushes to main run the full test suite (static checks +
build + tests with coverage) instead of static checks only. Feature
branch pushes still get static checks only; PRs to main are unchanged.
No double-run on PR merge since GitHub only fires a push event, not a
new pull_request event.
